protocol_target.mcp_spec_policy: Track latest stable MCP draft semantics; do not rely on undocumented or experimental protocol fields.

requirements: Pin each server to released SDK versions in dependency manifests.
Disallow prerelease/nightly SDK branches in CI and compliance tests.
Upgrade only after compliance suite remains green against this baseline.

stdio_contract.rule: Never emit logs, debug lines, progress text, or stack traces to stdout.

protocol_errors.description: Malformed JSON, invalid JSON-RPC envelopes, unknown methods, invalid params at protocol boundary.

tool_errors.description: Tool handler/runtime failures after a valid tools/call request.
tool_errors.shape: MCP tool error result (isError=true with actionable text; optionally structured data)

request_expected.notes: Reject missing required fields, wrong types, and invalid enums.

notification_expected.notes: Server may log to stderr only.

request_expected.notes: Reject extra top-level request fields or unsupported params fields unless explicitly documented.

notification_expected.notes: Drop invalid notification payload and log on stderr only.

request_expected.notes: Normal request/response semantics with matching id.

notification_expected.notes: Valid notifications are processed without any stdout response frame.

request_expected.notes: Return tool-level failure (isError=true) with actionable detail; keep protocol framing valid.

notification_expected.notes: No protocol response for notifications; diagnostic details may go to stderr.
